name: Oak View National Bank
summary: Oak View National Bank provides personal and business banking products and services for commercial and retail customers. It offers checking, savings, retirement, and money market accounts; and certificate of deposits. The company also provides loans comprising home equity loans and line of credit; home mortgage loans; consumer loans; business loans, such as commercial lines of credit, term loans, and real estate loans; and personal and business credit cards. In addition, it offers other banking services comprising bill payment, ACH, remote deposit capture, and merchant services; and online and mobile banking services. The company operates in Warrenton, Marshall, and Culpeper in Virginia, the United States. Oak View National Bank was founded in 2009 and is based in Warrenton, Virginia.
